【春物】【辉夜大小姐】【路人女主】【你的名字】【天气之子】……
转世樱花国，白川宸发现自己竟是是唯一的神明。
肩头蹲只笨蛋黑金瞳母猫清司，是被他神性吸引的追随者，张口就是“主人，你缺不缺老婆？”
桐须真冬：白川宸，不要在学校叫我小真冬！
平冢静：喂，魂淡，明天和我回趟家！
雪之下雪乃：色狼宸君，请和我一起处理委托吧！
中野二乃：色狼、魂淡，有我一个还不够吗，非要凑齐五姐妹，真是个彻头彻尾的变态！
花城杏子：快拉着我的手，我们一起跨越浦岛隧道！
西宫硝子：天使<(￣ ﹌ ￣)>男朋友
四宫辉夜：未婚夫大人，余生请多指教！
樱岛麻衣：终于再次见到你了，我好累……
天野阳菜：笨蛋宸君，我不都告诉你不许来天上找我吗……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ce86d44634b39f9707f1557c9c451691~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"典藏级小猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7604435536442313790","book_name":"综漫：居住东京的神明大人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605148646929089086","read_count":"16981","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"177479"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"81","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,二次元,魂穿,多女主,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ce86d44634b39f9707f1557c9c451691~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381670&x-signature=Ifv%2B4YdXp%2Bq2engdxFDK00k4HcE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92660047985","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004110FBCE98BE9D6E4A780324"}"},"re 小作者第11，12，13章（番外）主要讲的是反对校园霸凌
因为主播幼年时也常常被校园霸凌所困扰，或许是一时兴起或蓄谋已久才借（言叶之庭二创）发出我的心声。
同时我希望看完书的小读者们不要成为校园霸凌的施暴者或受害者。
我有一个小小的请求：请各位在以后遇到校园霸凌时，哪怕不出手相助，也不要冷眼旁待，
我代替同为校园霸凌受害者，向各位小读者致谢","text_exts":[{"e":67,"s":63,"text":"蓄谋已久","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%93%84%E8%B0%8B%E5%B7%B2%E4%B9%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741976704A780324%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607048108023268158%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227604435536442313790%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%93%84%E8%B0%8B%E5%B7%B2%E4%B9%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771156220,"group_id":"7604435536442313790","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"用笔代替爱致敬童年
天下英雄如过江之鲫，人中龙凤尚且举步维艰，我等鱼目岂能一生顺遂
喜欢吃拉面，喜欢吃双份拉面，喜欢……“老板，再来一碗！”
